common_scale_note: All raw expert quantiles and targets are transformed with the no-digital SGQ-LSTM training scaler before WIS comparison and fusion.
selection: predefined safety grid on rolling fold 2; minimum four resolved outcomes before digital activation
online_update_rule: Weights are updated only after prior targets become observable, including the simulated reporting delay. No future outcomes are used.
regional_scope: China North/South and USA HHS1-HHS10 reported separately
